title: melhania bracteosa
intro: Melhania bracteosa, also known as 'Cheel's Melhania' or 'Wild Turmeric', is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Melhania bracteosa include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of ointments or creams.
